theme.en: AMD Doubles Down on Taiwan as Nvidia Yields China
theme.zh: AMD加码押注台湾,英伟达让出中国

dek.en: EPYC Venice begins its 2nm ramp at TSMC the same week Lisa Su pledges another $10B to Taiwan, Taipei runs its first formal raids on Nvidia-chip smuggling rings, and Jensen Huang concedes the China AI market to Huawei. The Strait is now the single most important map in the industry.
dek.zh: EPYC Venice在台积电2nm进入量产爬坡的同一周,苏姿丰再向台湾承诺投资100亿美元;台北首次正式收网,搜查英伟达走私链条;黄仁勋则承认中国AI市场已让予华为。海峡两侧,正成为产业地图上最关键的一条线。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: AMD begins 256-core EPYC Venice ramp on TSMC N2, pledges $10B more for Taiwan
title.zh: AMD于台积电N2量产256核EPYC Venice,再追加百亿美元台湾投资

summary.en: AMD's sixth-generation EPYC processor, codenamed Venice, has entered production ramp on TSMC's N2 node — the first 2nm server CPU to reach that stage. AMD claims a 70% per-socket performance leap over Turin and packs up to 256 Zen 6 cores. Lisa Su paired the announcement with a $10B fresh-investment commitment in Taiwan, deepening AMD's dependence on Hsinchu just as Washington presses for chip diversification.
summary.zh: AMD第六代EPYC处理器(代号Venice)已在台积电N2节点进入量产爬坡,成为首款进入该阶段的2nm服务器CPU。AMD宣称单插槽性能较Turin提升70%,最高可达256核Zen 6。苏姿丰同步宣布对台湾追加100亿美元投资,在华盛顿力推产能多元化之际,反而加深了AMD对新竹的依赖。

title.en: Nvidia says it has 'largely conceded' China's AI chip market to Huawei
title.zh: 英伟达:中国AI芯片市场已'基本让予'华为

summary.en: Jensen Huang told investors and Beijing officials in the same week that Nvidia has 'largely conceded' the Chinese AI accelerator market to Huawei, citing successive rounds of U.S. export controls and a hardening domestic-substitution policy. The shift is now explicit company posture, not analyst speculation — and reframes how Nvidia models its 2026–2027 TAM.
summary.zh: 黄仁勋在同一周内向投资者与北京官员表示,英伟达已'基本让予'中国AI加速器市场予华为,原因是美国连续多轮出口管制叠加中国国产替代政策持续加码。这从分析师推测转为公司官方立场,将重塑英伟达对2026–2027年市场空间的建模方式。

title.en: Intel's Crescent Island AI GPU sidesteps HBM with 160GB of LPDDR5X
title.zh: Intel新AI GPU绕开HBM瓶颈:160GB LPDDR5X方案曝光

summary.en: Leaked PCB shots of Intel's upcoming Crescent Island accelerator show a single-GPU design with pads for 20 LPDDR5X modules — roughly 160GB of memory, no HBM. The choice trades bandwidth for availability and cost at a moment when HBM3E supply is committed through 2027. For inference-skewed workloads, that may be a defensible bet; for training, it's a concession.
summary.zh: Intel下一代加速器Crescent Island的PCB照流出,显示单GPU设计搭配20颗LPDDR5X(约160GB),完全跳过HBM。在HBM3E产能已锁定至2027年的当下,该方案以带宽换可得性与成本——面向推理负载尚可成立,面向训练则是退让。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC Arizona Fab 21 posts $514M Q1 profit, already past full-year 2025
title.zh: 台积电亚利桑那Fab 21单季获利5.14亿美元,已超去年全年

summary.en: TSMC's first Arizona fab reported Q1 2026 net profit of $514M — exceeding the full 2025 figure in a single quarter, on the back of priority N4/N3 allocations for Apple and AMD. The number complicates the long-running narrative that the U.S. site cannot match Taiwan economics, though wafer-cost-per-die remains ~30% higher than Hsinchu's twin lines.
summary.zh: 台积电首座亚利桑那厂2026年一季度净利5.14亿美元,单季即超越2025年全年水平,主因是苹果与AMD的N4/N3订单优先排程。该数据动摇了'美国厂经济性追不上台湾'的长期叙事,但单片成本仍较新竹姊妹线高约30%。

title.en: ASML chief: tighter China export rules will speed up Chinese rival tools
title.zh: ASML首席执行官:进一步对华管制将加速中国本土设备替代

summary.en: Speaking to European lawmakers, ASML's CEO warned that another round of China-specific export restrictions would directly accelerate indigenous Chinese lithography efforts and erode the West's structural advantage. The point is no longer just an industry argument; it is now in front of policymakers ahead of the EU's mid-year tool-control review.
summary.zh: ASML首席执行官在面向欧洲议员的发言中警告,新一轮针对中国的出口管制将直接加速中国本土光刻设备的发展,侵蚀西方的结构性优势。该论点已不再止于行业层面,而是在欧盟年中设备管制评估前正式摆上政策桌面。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储器

title.en: Samsung strike ends just as Micron opens permanent Seoul HBM design roles
title.zh: 三星罢工刚落幕,美光在首尔挂出HBM设计长期职位

summary.en: Samsung's union voted to suspend strike action after the company agreed to AI-linked bonus pay — and within hours, Micron posted permanent HBM design engineer openings in Seoul, with packages reportedly reaching the high end of Korean DRAM compensation. The hire-or-be-hired squeeze on Samsung's HBM4 team is now visible in job postings, not just rumor.
summary.zh: 三星工会在公司同意以AI业绩挂钩的奖金后投票暂停罢工——数小时内,美光便在首尔挂出HBM设计工程师的长期职位,薪酬据报达韩国DRAM行业高位。对三星HBM4团队的人才争夺已不再是传闻,而是公开的招聘动作。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: ASML pairs with Tata Electronics on India fab tool support
title.zh: ASML与塔塔电子合作,支持印度晶圆厂设备落地

summary.en: ASML and Tata Electronics announced a formal partnership covering lithography tool installation, service, and engineer training for Tata's Dholera fab. The deal is narrow — no leading-edge EUV is involved — but it is the first time ASML has signed a structured local-services commitment in India, signaling the country is now a second-order destination on its support map.
summary.zh: ASML与塔塔电子宣布正式合作,内容涵盖塔塔Dholera晶圆厂光刻设备的安装、服务与工程师培训。本次合作未涉及尖端EUV,但这是ASML首次在印度签署结构化的本地服务承诺,标志着印度已进入其支持版图的第二梯队。

title.en: Asahi Kasei rolls out photosensitive polyimide for panel-level packaging
title.zh: 旭化成推出适用于面板级封装的光敏聚酰亚胺薄膜

summary.en: Asahi Kasei announced a new photosensitive polyimide film aimed at panel-level advanced packaging — the format TSMC, Samsung, and Intel are all betting on for the post-CoWoS generation. The material targets higher dimensional stability across 600mm-class panels, the size at which yield economics historically fall apart.
summary.zh: 旭化成发布面向面板级先进封装的全新光敏聚酰亚胺薄膜——这正是台积电、三星与Intel共同押注的后CoWoS世代封装形态。该材料主攻600mm级面板上的尺寸稳定性,而这正是面板级封装良率历史上的最大瓶颈。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘

title.en: Taiwan raids 12 locations in first formal crackdown on Nvidia chip smuggling
title.zh: 台湾首次正式查抄英伟达走私网络,搜查12处地点

summary.en: Taiwan prosecutors raided 12 sites and are seeking the detention of three individuals accused of forging export documents to route Nvidia Hopper and Blackwell systems through Super Micro channels into mainland China. It is Taipei's first formal enforcement action against AI-chip diversion since the rules tightened — and a clear signal that the island intends to police its end of the export-control architecture rather than leave it to Washington.
summary.zh: 台湾检方对12处地点展开搜查,并寻求羁押三名涉嫌伪造出口文件、借由Super Micro渠道将英伟达Hopper与Blackwell系统转运至中国大陆的当事人。这是台北自管制收紧以来首次对AI芯片走私采取正式执法行动,明确表态将主动管好出口管制链条的台湾一端,而非任由华盛顿单边执行。

title.en: Taipei weighs limiting TSMC USD-dividend FX conversion to once a year
title.zh: 台北拟将台积电美元股息换汇限定为每年一次

summary.en: Reuters reports Taiwan's central bank is considering capping how often TSMC may convert its U.S.-dollar dividend inflows to NT$ to once per year, in an effort to dampen FX-market shocks from the company's now-dominant earnings. For a single firm to motivate a capital-account policy change is itself a story about how concentrated Taiwan's economy has become around one foundry.
summary.zh: 据路透社报道,台湾央行正考虑将台积电美元股息换汇频率上限定为每年一次,以减缓单家公司收益对外汇市场的冲击。一家企业即能触发资本账户政策调整,本身就是台湾经济过度集中于单一晶圆代工厂的写照。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: Intel and Qualcomm both circle Tenstorrent at a $5B+ price tag
title.zh: Intel与高通同时接洽Tenstorrent,潜在估值逾50亿美元

summary.en: Bloomberg reports that Intel and Qualcomm have separately approached Tenstorrent about a takeover that could value the AI-chip startup at more than $5 billion — roughly 60% above its November 2025 Fidelity-led primary at $3.2B pre-money. Tenstorrent's spatial-dataflow Tensix architecture and RISC-V chiplet line are the specific pieces both incumbents want; the read-through is that this is now the strategic price level for the whole non-incumbent compute layer in the same week Cerebras priced its IPO at $56B.
summary.zh: 据Bloomberg报道,Intel与高通分别接触Tenstorrent,潜在收购估值超过50亿美元,较该公司2025年11月由Fidelity领投的32亿美元投前估值高出约六成。两家巨头看中的具体是Tenstorrent的空间数据流Tensix架构及其RISC-V chiplet产品线;在Cerebras同周以560亿美元定价IPO的背景下,这一价格被读作整个非主流算力赛道的战略锚点。

title.en: Cerebras lands Kimi K2.6 trillion-parameter inference on its wafer-scale stack
title.zh: Cerebras晶圆级平台拿下Kimi K2.6万亿参数推理

summary.en: Cerebras announced production deployment of Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.6 trillion-parameter model for enterprise inference on CS-3 systems — the first named trillion-parameter workload running entirely on its wafer-scale engines without offload. The same week as its $5.55B IPO and a $20B+ OpenAI inference commitment disclosed in the prospectus, the Kimi deal is the more concrete answer to 'do customers actually use this?' than any banker chart.
summary.zh: Cerebras宣布以CS-3系统投产部署Moonshot AI的Kimi K2.6万亿参数模型企业推理——这是首个完全在其晶圆级引擎上、无需外溢运行的具名万亿参数负载。与55.5亿美元IPO和招股书披露的逾200亿美元OpenAI推理承诺相比,Kimi合作更直接回答了'客户真的在用吗'这一问题。

theme.en: Compute-in-Memory Comes of Age While LLM Serving Treats Hardware as a First-Class Variable
theme.zh: 存算一体走向系统,LLM服务把硬件当作一等变量

dek.en: This week the hardware stack and the software stack converge on the same problem from opposite directions. From the silicon side: a fabricated TiO2/HfZrO2 ferroelectric FET, a 16Kb 3T1R ReRAM CIM macro spanning CNN and SNN inference, and an SNN inference architecture that finally exploits temporal sparsity. From the systems side: three new LLM-serving works treat GPU power caps, MoE expert parallelism, and per-phase quantization not as constraints but as control knobs.
dek.zh: 本周硬件栈与软件栈从两端逼近同一个问题。硬件侧:TiO2/HfZrO2铁电FET的工艺、同时支持CNN与SNN推理的16Kb 3T1R ReRAM CIM macro、以及真正利用时间稀疏性的SNN推理架构。系统侧:三项新的LLM服务工作分别将GPU功耗上限、MoE专家并行、按阶段量化精度从硬约束转为可调旋钮。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: 2D GaSe single-pixel spectrometer via electro-optical barrier co-modulation
title.zh: 基于电-光势垒协同调制的2D GaSe单像素光谱仪

summary.en: A few-layer GaSe device is shown to act as a computational spectrometer by jointly modulating an electrostatic gate and an optical bias, replacing the dispersive optics of a conventional spectrometer with a single pixel. Reconstruction is done in software. The interest for chip-scale sensing is real, though spectral resolution and noise floor haven't been benchmarked against silicon-photonic or filter-array competitors.
summary.zh: 作者证明一只少层GaSe器件可同时受电压和光学偏置调制,从而以单像素替代传统光谱仪的色散光学,后续由软件重建光谱。对芯片级光谱传感意义明确,但本文尚未与硅光及滤波器阵列方案在光谱分辨率与噪声底上做对比。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与体系结构

title.en: Dynamic control-flow execution for runtime-reconfigurable processors
title.zh: 面向运行时可重构处理器的动态控制流执行支持

summary.en: The paper tackles a long-standing limitation of CGRA/reconfigurable fabrics: irregular control flow forces fallback to a host CPU and wipes out the energy advantage. The proposed extensions support data-dependent branches natively on the reconfigurable substrate. Evaluation is simulation-only, but the design is concrete enough to be implementable, and the energy numbers are competitive with prior CGRA work.
summary.zh: 本文针对CGRA等可重构架构长期存在的短板:不规则控制流必须回落到主机CPU,能效优势随之消失。作者提出的扩展可在可重构基底原生支持数据相关分支。评估为仿真级,但设计具体到可落地的程度,能效与前期CGRA工作相当。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: E-ReCON: a 16Kb 3T1R ReRAM CIM macro for both CNN and SNN edge inference
title.zh: E-ReCON:面向CNN与SNN边缘推理的16Kb 3T1R ReRAM存内计算宏

summary.en: The macro is real silicon: a 0.85µm² 3T1R ReRAM bitcell driving an AND-based in-memory multiplier that supports both conventional CNN and spiking workloads, with a novel interleaved 10T/28T adder tree to amortize accumulation overhead. The dual-mode CNN/SNN capability is the differentiating claim — most prior CIM macros pick one. Edge-inference targets, not data-center.
summary.zh: 该宏为实际流片:0.85µm² 3T1R ReRAM位单元搭配基于AND的存内乘法,同时支持传统CNN与脉冲网络负载,并引入新颖的10T/28T交错加法树以分摊累加开销。'CNN/SNN双模'是其核心差异点——此前的CIM宏多只支持其一。面向边缘推理,而非数据中心。

title.en: ELSA: an elastic SNN inference architecture that exploits temporal sparsity
title.zh: ELSA:真正利用时间稀疏性的弹性脉冲神经网络推理架构

summary.en: SNN accelerators have advertised event-driven efficiency for years, but most are still layer-by-layer pipelines that wait for the full input window before emitting an output. ELSA implements true elastic inference: confident outputs are emitted as soon as enough spikes accumulate, and downstream layers are gated accordingly. The architectural lesson is that SNN efficiency is fundamentally a scheduling problem, not just a circuit one.
summary.zh: SNN加速器多年来一直宣传事件驱动的能效,但绝大多数仍是逐层流水、等满输入窗口才输出。ELSA实现了真正的弹性推理:在脉冲累积到置信阈值时立即输出,下游层据此被门控。其架构启示是:SNN的能效首先是调度问题,而非单纯的电路问题。

title.en: High-performance TiO2 ferroelectric FETs with HfZrO2 dielectric for neuromorphic computing
title.zh: 面向类脑计算的高性能TiO2铁电FET(HfZrO2介质)

summary.en: Bottom-gate FeFETs using TiO2 channels on HfZrO2 ferroelectric dielectric, reported with high on/off ratios across two gate-stack thicknesses. The novelty is moving the CMOS-back-end-compatible HZO stack into a configuration that supports gradual conductance modulation — the prerequisite for analog weight storage. Single-device characterization only; no array-level retention or endurance data yet.
summary.zh: 作者在HfZrO2铁电介质上以TiO2作为沟道,制备底栅FeFET并报告两种栅叠厚度下的高开关比。新意在于将与CMOS后段兼容的HZO体系配置为支持电导渐变调制——这是模拟权重存储的前提。仅为单器件表征,尚无阵列级保持或耐久数据。

title.en: AI Research (hardware-relevant)
title.zh: AI研究(与硬件相关)

title.en: Mix-Quant: phase-aware quantization — aggressive in prefill, precise in decode
title.zh: Mix-Quant:阶段感知量化——预填激进、解码精确

summary.en: Most LLM quantization schemes pick a single precision for the whole forward pass; Mix-Quant observes that the prefill phase (compute-bound, error-tolerant due to attention averaging) and the decode phase (memory-bound, error-sensitive) want different precisions. The framework runs prefill at FP4 / INT4 and decode at higher precision, with measured throughput gains on agentic, long-context workloads. The framing — phase as a first-class quantization dimension — is the more durable contribution than any specific schedule.
summary.zh: 多数LLM量化方案对整次前向使用统一精度;Mix-Quant注意到prefill阶段(计算密集、对误差宽容)与decode阶段(内存密集、对误差敏感)需要不同精度。框架在prefill使用FP4/INT4,decode使用更高精度,在Agentic长上下文负载上获得实测吞吐量提升。比起具体调度,'阶段作为一等量化维度'这一框架本身更具持久价值。

title.en: PALS: power-aware LLM serving — GPU power caps as a runtime variable
title.zh: PALS:功耗感知的LLM服务——把GPU功耗上限当成运行时变量

summary.en: Existing LLM-serving systems treat GPU power as a static datacenter constraint and optimize only batching, scheduling, and parallelism. PALS treats power caps as a first-class control surface, dynamically retuning per-GPU power limits across expert-parallel MoE replicas to match the actual computation cost per token. The reported gains in tokens-per-watt are modest but the architectural shift is the right one: in a memory-bound inference regime, the binding constraint is increasingly thermal, not FLOPS.
summary.zh: 现有LLM服务系统将GPU功耗视为数据中心层面的静态约束,只在批处理、调度、并行上做优化。PALS将功耗上限当作一等控制面,在专家并行MoE副本之间动态调整每卡功耗上限,以匹配每token的实际计算开销。论文给出的能效提升不算激进,但架构方向是对的:在内存受限的推理形态下,真正的硬约束越来越是热,而非FLOPS。

title.en: NanoCP: request-level dynamic context parallelism for data-expert parallel MoE decoding
title.zh: NanoCP:用于数据-专家并行MoE解码的请求级动态上下文并行

summary.en: Modern MoE serving binds each request's attention, MoE communication, and KV cache to a single instance — fine for short prompts, ruinous for long context because attention cost scales with KV-cache size while MoE all-to-all latency scales with batch. NanoCP dynamically splits context parallelism per request, decoupling these two scaling laws. The contribution is small in code but large in implication: MoE serving has to stop pretending requests are uniform.
summary.zh: 现代MoE服务系统将每个请求的注意力、MoE通信与KV缓存绑定到单一实例——短提示词没问题,长上下文则灾难性:注意力开销随KV缓存大小增长,MoE的all-to-all延迟随批大小增长,两者的扩展规律相互矛盾。NanoCP按请求动态分配上下文并行度,解耦了这两个维度。代码层改动不大,意义却大:MoE服务必须停止假装请求是同质的。

title.en: Quantum Devices
title.zh: 量子器件

title.en: Towards transistor-based quantum computing: telesistors and topologically protected Clifford gates
title.zh: 面向晶体管化的量子计算:Telesistor与拓扑保护Clifford门

summary.en: The authors propose a universal QC architecture in which the elementary unit is a teleportation-based 'telesistor' built from symmetry-protected topological ground states, which suppress certain noise channels and yield Clifford gates without active error correction. The hope is to make the architectural picture of a quantum processor more transistor-like — a tractable, composable element. Theoretical proposal; nothing fabricated.
summary.zh: 作者提出一种通用量子计算架构,其基元为基于对称性保护拓扑序基态的'telesistor':通过隐形传态实现门操作,从而被动抑制特定噪声、无需主动纠错即可获得Clifford门。其雄心在于让量子处理器的架构图景更像经典晶体管:可分解、可组合。目前为理论提案,尚无器件实现。

title.en: EDA, Verification & Design Automation
title.zh: EDA与设计自动化

title.en: LLMs for secure hardware design: opportunities and severe vulnerabilities
title.zh: 大模型用于硬件安全设计:机会与严重漏洞

summary.en: A comprehensive review of LLMs across the EDA stack — RTL generation, testbench synthesis, spec-to-silicon — that breaks from the usual cheerleading and catalogs concrete vulnerabilities: prompt-injection-induced Trojans, leakage of pre-silicon IP through chat logs, and verification gaps the models reliably miss. The clearest practitioner-facing summary published this year.
summary.zh: 对大模型在EDA各环节(RTL生成、测试平台合成、规格到芯片的桥接)应用的全面综述,但跳出业内常见的乐观叙述,系统记录了具体漏洞:提示注入诱导的硬件木马、聊天日志泄漏前期IP、以及模型反复遗漏的验证盲区。是今年面向实务工程师最清晰的一份梳理。
